title: convolvulus chondrilloides
intro: Convolvulus chondrilloides, also known as sea bindweed or Mediterranean sea bindweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the morning glory family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Convolvulus chondrilloides include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Convolvulus chondrilloides include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
